retry_reason: Failure of the B-tree search (ENOENT) or inode lookup is due to persistent on-disk state; retrying without changing the offset or root will not succeed.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to look up a free space inode via a B-tree search and extract its key, not merely to manage a reference count. It includes substantial non-refcount logic: btrfs_search_slot, key extraction, path management, NOFS flag preservation, and mapping flag adjustment. The call to btrfs_iget_path (which acquires a reference) is only one step in a broader lookup procedure.
judge.retry_reason: Failure of the B-tree search (ENOENT) or inode lookup is due to persistent on-disk state; retrying without changing the offset or root will not succeed.

final.retry_reason: Failure of the B-tree search (ENOENT) or inode lookup is due to persistent on-disk state; retrying without changing the offset or root will not succeed.
